title: intellectronica/ruler — Apply the same rules to all coding agents
excerpt: Centralised Rule Management... Automatic Distribution to configuration files of supported AI agents (GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, Cursor, OpenAI Codex CLI, Aider, Windsurf...). Rule Files (*.md) discovered recursively from .ruler/ and concatenated. License MIT, ~2.7k stars, v0.3.42 (May 2026).
